title: ChatGPT, AI And Other Tech Have This Stock Teasing A Breakout
text: As interest in ChatGPT and generative AI rises, market research firm Gartner taps those trends as it explores a breakout. The post ChatGPT, AI And Other Tech Have This Stock Teasing A Breakout appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Gartner (IT) Q4 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Up Y/Y
text: Gartner (IT) fourth-quarter 2022 earnings and revenues surge year over year.

title: Gartner (IT) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Gartner (IT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 43.97% and 2.62%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
